no_final_answer: Agent never produced a final answer output, leaving the response empty.
final_placement_omitted: Agent performed earlier steps but omitted the final placement of the item into the target receptacle.
object_not_examined: Agent never examined or looked at the target object as needed.
cleaning_step_omitted: Agent failed to perform the cleaning step before placement.
incorrect_receptacle_placement: Agent placed the object into the wrong receptacle instead of the specified target.
heating_step_omitted: Agent omitted the heating operation required by the task.
wrong_item_chosen_for_cooling: Agent selected an incorrect object (not the task's target) when attempting to cool.
required_object_not_picked: Agent never picked up the object required by the instruction.
cooling_step_omitted: Agent skipped the required cooling operation before placement.
